message.content:
- Dolly is a large language model trained on the Databricks Machine Learning Platform 
- A two-year-old open source model (GPT-J) can exhibit high quality instruction following behavior with just 30 minutes of fine tuning on a focused corpus of 50k records 
- Dolly is not licensed for commercial use and is intended exclusively for research purposes 
- Dolly has limitations in its performance such as struggling with syntactically complex prompts, mathematical operations, factual errors, dates and times, open-ended question answering, hallucination, enumerating lists of specific length, and stylistic mimicry 
- The Dolly model family is under active development and users can train it by adding the dollyrepo to Databricks and running the train_dolly notebook.
